'''podhalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keckhanded|keckhanded]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keckhanded|keckhanded]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| podhalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhalithi|podhalithi]] || [[word:podhaliji|podhaliji]] || [[word:podhalishi|podhalishi]] || [[word:podhaliki|podhaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhaluthuthu|podhaluthuthu]] || [[word:podhalujuju|podhalujuju]] || [[word:podhalushushu|podhalushushu]] || [[word:podhalukuku|podhalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhaluthu|podhaluthu]] || [[word:podhaluju|podhaluju]] || [[word:podhalushu|podhalushu]] || [[word:podhaluku|podhaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhalufthuf|podhalufthuf]] || [[word:podhalufjuf|podhalufjuf]] || [[word:podhalufshuf|podhalufshuf]] || [[word:podhalufkuf|podhalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhalethe|podhalethe]] || [[word:podhaleje|podhaleje]] || [[word:podhaleshe|podhaleshe]] || [[word:podhaleke|podhaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhalothotho|podhalothotho]] || [[word:podhalojojo|podhalojojo]] || [[word:podhaloshosho|podhaloshosho]] || [[word:podhalokoko|podhalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhalotho|podhalotho]] || [[word:podhalojo|podhalojo]] || [[word:podhalosho|podhalosho]] || [[word:podhaloko|podhaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhalofthof|podhalofthof]] || [[word:podhalofjof|podhalofjof]] || [[word:podhalofshof|podhalofshof]] || [[word:podhalofkof|podhalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhalïfthïf|podhalïfthïf]] || [[word:podhalïfjïf|podhalïfjïf]] || [[word:podhalïfshïf|podhalïfshïf]] || [[word:podhalïfkïf|podhalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhalïfthïfthïf|podhalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:podhalïfjïfjïf|podhalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:podhalïfshïfshïf|podhalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:podhalïfkïfkïf|podhalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhalïfthïf|podhalïfthïf]] || [[word:podhalïfjïf|podhalïfjïf]] || [[word:podhalïfshïf|podhalïfshïf]] || [[word:podhalïfkïf|podhalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhalïfthïf|podhalïfthïf]] || [[word:podhalïfjïf|podhalïfjïf]] || [[word:podhalïfshïf|podhalïfshïf]] || [[word:podhalïfkïf|podhalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhalæthæ|podhalæthæ]] || [[word:podhalæjæ|podhalæjæ]] || [[word:podhalæshæ|podhalæshæ]] || [[word:podhalækæ|podhalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhalathatha|podhalathatha]] || [[word:podhalajaja|podhalajaja]] || [[word:podhalashasha|podhalashasha]] || [[word:podhalakaka|podhalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhalatha|podhalatha]] || [[word:podhalaja|podhalaja]] || [[word:podhalasha|podhalasha]] || [[word:podhalaka|podhalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhalafthaf|podhalafthaf]] || [[word:podhalafjaf|podhalafjaf]] || [[word:podhalafshaf|podhalafshaf]] || [[word:podhalafkaf|podhalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:podhalasha|podhalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:podhalshësha|podhalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podhalrosha|podhalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podhalmusha|podhalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:podhalyasha|podhalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodhalnkshësha|gopodhalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodhalnkrosha|gopodhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodhalnkmusha|gopodhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodhalnkyasha|gopodhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:podhadhalasha|podhadhalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podhadhalshësha|podhadhalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podhadhalrosha|podhadhalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podhadhalmusha|podhadhalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podhadhalyasha|podhadhalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodhadhalnkshësha|gopodhadhalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodhadhalnkrosha|gopodhadhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodhadhalnkmusha|gopodhadhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodhadhalnkyasha|gopodhadhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pedhælasha|pedhælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pedhælshësha|pedhælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pedhælrosha|pedhælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pedhælmusha|pedhælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pedhælyasha|pedhælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopedhælnkshësha|gopedhælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopedhælnkrosha|gopedhælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopedhælnkmusha|gopedhælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopedhælnkyasha|gopedhælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:podhfalasha|podhfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podhfalshësha|podhfalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podhfalrosha|podhfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podhfalmusha|podhfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podhfalyasha|podhfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodhfalnkshësha|gopodhfalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodhfalnkrosha|gopodhfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodhfalnkmusha|gopodhfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodhfalnkyasha|gopodhfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
